description: Add drag-and-drop and paste image support to Trade Notes and DailyJournalPreview

userStories.title: Audit Existing Image Upload Infrastructure
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to audit existing image upload code so that we reuse utilities and avoid duplication.
acceptanceCriteria: Confirm S3 utilities exist in src/lib/storage/s3.ts
Confirm handleImageInsert pattern with blob preview in journal-editor.tsx
Confirm handlePaste and handleDrop event handlers in journal-editor.tsx

userStories.title: Create Generic Image Upload tRPC Endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a generic image upload endpoint so that both trade notes and journal preview can upload images without creating attachment records.
acceptanceCriteria: Add getImageUploadUrl mutation accepting filename, mimeType, size, context parameters
Returns { presignedUrl, publicUrl } (publicUrl for embedding in HTML)
Uses existing S3 utilities from src/lib/storage/s3.ts

userStories.title: Integration Tests for Storage Router
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests for the storage router so that we verify upload URL generation works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests getImageUploadUrl returns valid presigned URL structure
Tests key format includes userId and context

userStories.title: Create useImageUpload Hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a reusable hook for image uploads so that any Tiptap editor can support paste/drop images.
acceptanceCriteria: Hook accepts context: string parameter (for S3 key organization)
Exports uploadImage(file: File): Promise<string | null> - returns public URL
Uploads via XMLHttpRequest with progress tracking

userStories.title: Create useTiptapImageHandlers Hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a hook that provides paste/drop handlers for Tiptap editors so that image handling is consistent across editors.
acceptanceCriteria: Hook accepts editor: Editor | null, uploadImage: (file: File) => Promise<string | null>
Implements handleImageInsert with instant blob preview pattern (from journal-editor)
Attaches/detaches event listeners to editor DOM via useEffect

userStories.title: Create TradeNoteEditor Component
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a minimal rich text editor for trade notes so that I can paste/drop images into my notes.
acceptanceCriteria: Minimal Tiptap: StarterKit + Image + Link + Placeholder (no toolbar)
Placeholder text: Add notes about this trade... (paste images with Ctrl+V)
Auto-save on blur or after 500ms debounce
Uses useImageUpload hook with context trade-notes
Props: value: string | null, onChange: (value: string | null) => void, tradeId: string

userStories.title: Replace EditableTextarea with TradeNoteEditor
userStories.description: As a trader, I want the Trade Note tab to use the new editor so that I can add images to my notes.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace EditableTextarea in NotesSection with TradeNoteEditor
Pass trade.notes, onUpdateField, and trade.id as props
Existing plain text notes render correctly in Tiptap
Verify in browser: paste image works, drop image works

userStories.title: Add Image Handlers to DailyJournalPreview
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to paste/drop images in the Daily Journal preview (trade detail) so that I can quickly add screenshots.
acceptanceCriteria: Add image upload capability using existing dailyJournal.getUploadUrl + confirmUpload pattern
Only enable image handling when editable={true}
Verify in browser: paste image works in journal preview
